javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
Interface HttpFilePlayerConstants

public interface HttpFilePlayerConstants

This interface defines constants that can be used to configure the http file player.
These Parameter's must be used with an associated URL
The pseudo code below plays a file from an http server, and will time-out if the server does not respond after 2 seconds: 

        Parameters myParameters = mySession.createParameters();
        myParameters.put(HttpFilePlayerConstants.FETCH_TIMEOUT,2000);
        myMediaGroup.play(new URI("http://www.server.com/myfile.3gp"), 0, null, myParameters)

Field Summary
static Parameter FETCH_TIMEOUT
          The interval in ms to wait for the content to be returned before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.
static Parameter FILE_MAX_AGE
          Indicates that the player is willing to use content whose age is no greater than the specified time in seconds (cf. max-age in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).
static Parameter FILE_MAX_STALE
          Indicates that the player is willing to use content that has exceeded its expiration time (cf. max-stale in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]).
static Parameter STREAMING_ENABLED
          If true, The play of the file will start before the entire file is received from the HTTP server
 

Field Detail

FETCH_TIMEOUT

static final Parameter FETCH_TIMEOUT
The interval in ms to wait for the content to be returned before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.

FILE_MAX_STALE

static final Parameter FILE_MAX_STALE
Indicates that the player is willing to use content that has exceeded its expiration time (cf. max-stale in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]). If maxstale is assigned a value, then the file is willing to accept content that has exceeded its expiration time by no more than the specified number of seconds.

FILE_MAX_AGE

static final Parameter FILE_MAX_AGE
Indicates that the player is willing to use content whose age is no greater than the specified time in seconds (cf. max-age in HTTP 1.1 [RFC2616]). The file is not willing to use stale content, unless maxstale is also provided.

STREAMING_ENABLED

static final Parameter STREAMING_ENABLED
If true, The play of the file will start before the entire file is received from the HTTP server
